scripts.verify: bun run typecheck && bun test && bun run --filter '@comptoir/web' lint
scripts.verify:multi-restaurant: bun run typecheck && bun test && bun run --cwd packages/api test:tenant-scope && bun run --cwd packages/api test:active-context-coverage && bun run --cwd packages/api test:shared-worker-boundary && bun run --cwd packages/api test:deferred-phase-boundary && bun run --cwd packages/web test:query-keys && bun run --cwd packages/web test:worker-share-locales && bun run --cwd packages/web lint && bun run --cwd packages/web build
